description: Payload binding on a UNIT variant (§51.0.B.1). <Idle bogus rule=.Dragging> attaches a bareword payload binding (`bogus`) to Idle, which has zero payload fields. Unit variants carry no fields to bind, so E-ENGINE-PAYLOAD-ON-UNIT-VARIANT fires (the §34 error partition).
rationale: §51.0.B.1 payload-binding attributes on a unit variant (zero fields per §14.4) SHALL fire E-ENGINE-PAYLOAD-ON-UNIT-VARIANT.
